title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 476.310 - No judge or clerk to have partner — exception
text:
476.310.  No judge or clerk to have partner — exception. — No judge, clerk or deputy clerk of any court shall have any partner practicing in the court in which he is a judge, clerk or deputy clerk, except that the partner of a municipal judge who is not a full-time judge may practice in other divisions of the circuit court if such practice does not involve municipal ordinance violation cases arising from a municipality which is served by such municipal judge.
(RSMo 1939 § 2026, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1862; 1919 § 2357; 1909 § 3879 
Effective 1-02-79
